full_prompt: Typography poster. Scene: the single word "GRAVITY" repeated as eight concentric rectangular rings receding to a glowing vanishing point, outer two rings fully legible and inner rings shrinking into text-like texture. Camera: centered one-point perspective. Lighting: rings darken toward the viewer. Color grading: black #0A0A0A, warm white #F2EFE8, signal red #C4302B. Texture/Medium: flat poster print and grain. Text-in-image: repeated typography is the composition; inner marks remain text-like texture, no invented glyphs, no watermark. AR 2:3

Typography poster. Scene: thousands of tiny ORBIT marks vary only in weight, spacing, and flow to build the light, shadow, and crisp profile of a human face; the profile boundary emerges exclusively from mark density. Camera: distant straight-on poster view. Lighting: facial highlights emerge from sparse marks and shadows from dense marks. Color grading: charcoal #16191E, parchment #E5D5AF, coral #D8563D. Texture/Medium: risograph grain and dry ink. Text-in-image: one large headline "ORBIT" remains sharp while the repeated micro marks recede into text-like texture, no invented glyphs, no watermark. AR 2:3

Texture/Medium: matte paint and rough spatial material. Text-in-image: the single word LOOK appears once, perfectly legible, no duplicate text, no extra words, no invented glyphs. AR 2:3
